overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a medieval great hall interior from a video game, featuring Gothic architecture with wooden truss ceilings, stained glass windows, and students in robes seated at long wooden tables. Natural light filters through the tall windows, illuminating the stone walls and ornate central carpet.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables and high ceilings

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the hall interior from a fixed vantage point at the end of the room

notable_agents.action: standing in the center aisle wearing dark robes, facing toward the windows
seated student in dark robes reading or writing at a wooden table

entered.detail: high vaulted ceiling with dark wooden trusses and beams
tall Gothic arched windows with intricate designs allowing bright natural light to enter
long dark wooden refectory tables arranged in parallel rows
ornate wrought iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling center
dark stone walls with wooden paneling and mounted tapestries
long ornate blue patterned rug running down the central aisle

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand Gothic hall interior with high wooden truss ceilings and tall stained glass windows on the right wall. Several students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables, while one figure stands in the center aisle. Natural light diffuses through the windows, casting a cool tone over the stone walls and blue carpet runner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand Gothic hall that emphasizes the scale and solemnity of the interior. It begins with a wide perspective of the high wooden truss ceilings and the expansive stone walls. As the eye moves across the space, natural light diffuses through tall stained glass windows on the right, casting a cool tone over the environment. The scene then settles on the students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables, while a single figure stands poised in the center aisle atop a blue carpet runner.
